## Packaging
- Windows portable app: `dist/windows/RHYME/RHYME.exe`
- Windows installer: `dist/installer/RHYME-Setup.exe`

## Notes
- Requires system `ffmpeg` for decoding playback formats.
- First-time offline ASR may download model files.

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] App starts and scans local folder
- [ ] Playback, seek, volume and shortcuts work
- [ ] Lyrics flow works (Local -> Online -> Manual ASR)
- [ ] No crash during playlist switching and double-click play
